name: clinpub
description: End-to-end clinical data analysis and publication pipeline for SCI Q1/Q2 journals. Covers data cleaning, adaptive statistical analysis, IMRAD manuscript writing, peer review simulation, and topic mining.
descriptionZh: 端到端临床数据分析与发表管线，面向 SCI Q1/Q2 期刊。涵盖数据清洗、自适应统计分析、IMRAD 论文写作、同行评审模拟和选题挖掘。
